title: I Want to Start Freelancing But Don't Know How

posts._note: Talk about the problem. No link in first 3-5 lines. Make them feel the frustration. Then reveal the guide.
posts.linkedin:
You know you have skills people would pay for.

But every time you try to start freelancing, you freeze.

You spend an hour on your profile. Then close the laptop.
You research niches for two weeks. Then do nothing.
You tell yourself you'll start when you're "ready."

You're never ready. That's the trap.

The real problem isn't skill. It's the absence of a system.

Most people try to build a freelance career backwards — starting with a portfolio or platform profile before they've defined what they're selling, to whom, and for how much.

That's why they get nowhere.

I put together a free guide that gives you the exact system to go from zero to your first paying client in 30 days.

No experience required. No website needed.

It's called the C.L.I.E.N.T.™ Framework — and it covers everything from skill selection to closing your first deal.

👉 Download it free: https://publixion.com/guides/i-want-to-start-freelancing

#Freelancing #SideHustle #Solopreneur #Publixion

posts._note: Show 1 key model or system inside the guide. Build authority. Teach something real.
posts.linkedin:
Most freelancers fail before they start.

Not because they lack skill — because they skip the most important step: defining an offer.

"I do marketing" is not an offer.
"I do design" is not an offer.

An offer is a named, scoped, flat-fee deliverable with a clear outcome and a specific client in mind.

Here's the formula from the C.L.I.E.N.T.™ Framework:

→ C — Clarify Skill: Pick ONE monetizable skill. Not your favorite. The one businesses already pay for.
→ L — Lock Niche: "I help [specific audience] achieve [result] using [method]."
→ I — Install Offer: Name it. Scope it. Price it. "30-Day Email Revenue Boost — $1,200 flat."
→ E — Establish Authority: Optimize LinkedIn in 48 hours. Build 2–3 sample mockups. No website needed.
→ N — Network & Outreach: Send 10–20 targeted messages per day using a proven script.
→ T — Transact & Deliver: Run a structured discovery call. Close with confidence. Raise your rate.

That's the entire system. Linear, repeatable, scalable.

The full guide is free. 10 pages. No fluff.

👉 https://publixion.com/guides/i-want-to-start-freelancing

#Freelancing #ClientAcquisition #Solopreneur #Publixion

posts._note: Handle the top doubts: price, time, skill level, whether it will work for them.
posts.linkedin:
"I want to freelance but..."

— I don't have enough experience
— I don't know what to charge
— I don't have time to build a portfolio
— Nobody will pay me when there are better freelancers out there
— I tried once and it didn't work

Let me address all of these directly.

❌ "Not enough experience" — The guide shows you how to build mock case studies from scratch with zero client history. Experience is a positioning problem, not a reality problem.

❌ "Don't know what to charge" — The guide gives you a pricing framework. Starting range: $500–$1,500 per project. Low pricing doesn't attract more clients. It attracts worse ones.

❌ "No time for a portfolio" — You don't need one. You need 2–3 sample assets and an optimized LinkedIn headline. That takes 48 hours.

❌ "Better freelancers exist" — Clients don't hire the best. They hire the most specific. A niche specialist beats a generalist every single time.

❌ "Tried and failed" — You tried without a system. This time you have one.

This guide is free. There is no financial risk.

👉 https://publixion.com/guides/i-want-to-start-freelancing

#Freelancing #Mindset #SideHustle #Publixion
